titleStmt.title: SII 20.83: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 83. (B.K. No. 27 of 1935-36.) LAKSHMĒŚVAR, SHIRHATTI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up in the backyard of the Taluk Office.

summary.p: This record is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 48, Śōbhakṛit, Āshāḍha, Amāvāsye, Monday, Dakshiṇāyana-saṁkramaṇa corresponding to A.D. 1123, June 25. The Saṁkramaṇa occurred on the next day and the month was adhika Āshāḍha.

The inscription records a gift of land to Agastyapaṇḍitadēva, the disciple of Sāmavēdipaṇḍita for feeding and maintenance of the teacher who was teaching Kaumāra-vyākaraṇa and his students in the maṭha attached to the temple of Rāmēśvaradēva at Puligere, by Daṇḍanāyaka Nāgavarmayya, after purchasing the gift-land.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarā
raṁbhamūḷastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
kramadiṁ baṁda caḷukyarājyalategītaṁ tānaḍarppādaneṁdu manaṁgoṁḍeḷe ba
ṇnisalu caturudanvanmēkhaḷāḷaṁkṛyāttamahīmaṁḍaḷamaṁ samaṁtu tanagēkaccha
tramaṁ māḍi vikramadiṁ vikramacakravartti negaḻdaṁ cāḷukyacakrēśvara . Ā nṛpatiya
maneverggaḍe sēnādhipanīśvaraṁ tadīyānujanurvvīnutanesedirdda tējōniḷayaṁ sōvidēva
daṁḍādhīśa . Ene negaḻda sōvidēvana manegabhyudayaikakāraṇaṁ tānenisirddanupama mahi
maṁ taḷedaṁ vinayāṁbudhi nāgavarmmanatyunnatiyaṁ . jagamaṁ rakṣisi lakṣmiyaṁ taḷedu
tāṁ gōviṁdadaṁḍēśanammugidaṁḍādhipaneṁba matteraḍu tōḷaṁ pettu satśaṁkha cakragadā
padmavirājihastanesedirddaṁ nāgavarmmaṁ samastaguṇāḍhyaṁ puruṣōttamaṁ jananutaṁ śrī
vipranārāyaṇa . Eraḍaṟunūṟaṟoḻaggada purikarapuradalli divyatīrtthaṁ rāmēśvara
dēvarakhiḷatīrtthōtkaramaṁtadu saptavihagamuktisthāna . Allige . © svasti śrīmaccāḷu
kyavikrama varṣada 48 neya śōbhakṛtsaṁvatsaradāṣāḍhadamāvāsye sōmavāra dakṣiṇāyana
saṁkramaṇa vyatīpātadaṁdu . śāśvatamāgi paṁneraḍu mattaru māṟugoṁḍu rāmēśvarakā gavuṁ
ḍavoladoḷdasavaṁdada bhūmiyalli māhēśvaracakravartti sale dhāriṇi baṇnise nāgava
rmmanadrīśvaranaṁdanāpatipadābjamahābratanittanartthiyiṁ . Adeṁteṁdaḍe śrī rājadhāni
paṭṭaṇaṁ puligeṟeya gāvuṇḍavolada dasavaṁ dada bhūmiyalli daṇḍanāyakaṁ nā
gavarmmayyaṁgaḷu dravyanivēdanaṁ geydu dhārāpūrvvakaṁ sarvvanamasyaṁ sarvva bādhāpari
hāramāge paḍada śrī rāmēśvaradēvara maṭhadācāryyarbbeḷḷeya saṁtānōdbhava rssāma
vēdipaṁḍitadēvara śiṣyaragastyapaṁḍitadēvara kālaṁ karcciyā maṭhadalu kaumāra vyākaraṇa
maṁ pēḷvupādhyāyara jīvitakkaṁvalli kēḷva tapōdhanaraśanācchādanakkaṁ padinālkuṁ berala gē
ṇalu mūvattāṟuṁbārcciviḍiya pramāṇina gaḍiṁba nārāyaṇadēvaralliya ghaḷeya
laḷedu koṭṭeremattarppaṁneraḍakkaṁ sīme mūḍalkojjanūra dāriyā deseya ghaḷe 56
teṁkaṇa sīme gāvuṁḍavolanā deseya ghaḷe 48 paḍuvaṇa sīme gāvuṁḍavoladoḷagaṇa
haḷḷavā deseya ghaḷe 56 . baḍagaṇa sīme śrī svayaṁbhūsōmēśvaradēvara polanā deseya
ghaḷe 48 Iṁtī dharmmamaṁ nagara mahājanaṁ paṁcamaṭhamalliya taḷada baṇaṁjigaruvera
suṁ pratipāḷisuvaru . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanī yō
bhavadbhiḥ . sarvvānētānbhāvinaṟpārtthivēṁdrānbhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ
svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēti vasundharāṁ saṣṭhirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jā
yatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 20.83 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
